title: festuca ovina var. trabutii
intro: Festuca ovina var. trabutii is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, commonly known as sheep's fescue or Trabut's fescue. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Festuca ovina var. trabutii include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and ease respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used in traditional medicine, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
